privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic AWS cloud architecture diagram in EdrawMax from scratch. The expected output file paths (/home/ga/Diagrams/aws_architecture.eddx and /home/ga/Diagrams/aws_architecture.png) and required keyword lists are correctly aligned with the evaluation scripts. However, the metadata claims for minimum file sizes (10000 bytes for EDDX and 20000 bytes for PNG) contradict the verifier.py logic, which explicitly sets lower thresholds of 1000 bytes and 5000 bytes respectively.
